doc_content.summary: The stark-session-insights skill analyzes Claude Code session history (~/.claude/history.jsonl) to extract usage patterns, action frequencies, and user corrections. It processes this data locally to generate detailed, per-project markdown reports featuring activity rhythms, skill evolution, categorized pain points, and synthesized prose narratives highlighting how the user works and where friction occurs.
key_features: Per-project workflow and cadence analysis (hourly, weekly, session shape)
Extraction of user corrections ('no', 'stop', 'wrong') to identify friction points
Generates human-readable narratives and actionable recommendations from historical data
Tracks command (/stark-*) usage and shifting habits over time

alt_text: A usage-focused dashboard visualizing the stark-session-insights skill. It displays invocation commands, an execution flow diagram showing the parsing of history.jsonl into project insights, and feature cards detailing extracted metrics like work rhythms, skill usage, and AI-synthesized workflow corrections.
